name: Zeta Kappa frat boys | Special ALT
description:
Uh-oh… looks like your adventures with the Zeta Kappa boys didn’t go without consequences. You’re maybe pregnant, and maybe the dad’s one of the frat’s “kings.”

This alt is Anon’s request. Hope you enjoy it, hehe 😏❤️

No plot—just pure smut

Been through all the Zeta Kappa bots? Hung out with each of them? Well, here’s the fallout.

If this isn’t your thing, better skip it, because in this "plot", you’re not exactly the most virtuous scholarship girl.

Especially recommend using it with bigger models—works great with DeepSeek R1, keeping all the guys in play. JLLM, as usual, might struggle with multiple characters at once.

Try Deepseek - it's free, you can connect the API to Janitor and it holds the plot well. I made my own little guide on how to connect, but you can also find some on Reddit or the Janitor Discord server.

Having trouble with JLLM? Try changing the prompt. Swipe for new responses. Adjust the temperature—it’s currently set to 1–1.1. I also recommend trying other models.

Unfortunately, I can’t fix your issues with the LLM. :(

I highly recommend using prompts to get best experience.
